outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: As the Iran war drags on, Israeli solidarity comes under strain
outlets.summary: CNN reports growing tensions between US and Israel over war strategy, with public support dropping to 45.5%. Questions whether alliance can sustain prolonged conflict.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump unleashes curse-filled social media rant at Iran after U.S. rescues colonel
outlets.summary: NPR leads with Trump's profanity-laden Easter morning Truth Social posts threatening Iran with 'Power Plant Day' and 'Bridge Day' if Strait of Hormuz not reopened.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump issues profanity-laced ultimatum to Iran over Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: Fox News frames Trump's threats as decisive leadership. Highlights successful F-15E crew rescue as 'Easter miracle.' Emphasizes April 7 deadline.

outlets.name: Fox News Live
outlets.headline: F-15E crew member rescued in Iran as Trump threatens 'all hell'
outlets.summary: Live coverage leads with rescue success and Trump's escalatory rhetoric. Framed as strength under pressure.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 37 of US-Israeli attacks?
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera frames conflict as 'US-Israeli attacks on Iran.' Leads with death toll tracker showing 2,076+ confirmed killed. Highlights humanitarian impact.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Pope Leo calls for Easter peace as Iran war deadline looms
outlets.summary: BBC covers Pope Leo's Easter address alongside approaching April 7 Hormuz deadline. Analysis of diplomatic vs military tracks.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Search presses into night for 4 feared buried under Haifa building struck by missile
outlets.summary: Times of Israel leads with overnight rescue operations in Haifa. 3-4 still missing under rubble from Iranian ballistic missile direct hit. 82-year-old among critically injured.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Three Still Missing After Iranian Missile Hits Building in Haifa, 24 Wounded
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports on Haifa missile strike aftermath. Notes warhead may not have fully detonated, preventing even greater casualties.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran military rejects Trump's 'helpless, nervous' ultimatum — warns 'gates of hell will open'
outlets.summary: Press TV leads with Iran's defiant rejection of Trump's 48-hour deadline. Claims successful engagement of US rescue aircraft during F-15E recovery operation.

outlets.name: Tasnim News
outlets.headline: IRGC claims downing of US C-130 and 2 Black Hawks during rescue operation
outlets.summary: Tasnim leads with IRGC claims of downing US aircraft. State TV broadcast wreckage footage. US says MC-130s were deliberately destroyed after getting stuck in sand.
